title: SierraSlides: AI Feedback for Professional Slide Revision
conference: Led system design, implementation (Google Slides add-on), formative study (N=11), and technology probe study (N=13) with product managers using real-world slide decks.

title: Metacognitive Self-Revision for AI Agents
conference: Led architecture design, implementation, and deployment in a live course (500+ users). Evaluated with structured user feedback.

title: Trust Calibration Under LLM Inconsistency
conference: Designed controlled experiment (N=252), led statistical analysis in Python and R, built full-stack experimental infrastructure.

title: VAL: Interactive Task Planning Interface
conference: Developed React-based interactive GUI with real-time WebSocket communication for HTN planning agent.

title: AI-Augmented Financial Auditing
conference: Developed and deployed AI systems augmenting auditor workflows. Integrated domain expert feedback through weekly collaborative sessions.

title: Explainable Churn Prediction for Service Teams
conference: Built churn prediction model (XGBoost) with SHAP explanations on multi-terabyte datasets. Built lifecycle tracking pipeline reducing data inconsistencies by 93.9%.

title: Real-Time Background Segmentation
conference: Developed and deployed real-time segmentation model (PyTorch), achieving 1.5× speed and 34% accuracy improvement.

title: LTE Network KPI Analysis
conference: Analyzed KPI correlations on LTE eNB datasets using PCA to assess input-output predictability.

title: Sound Clouds: Participatory Music Generation
conference: Fine-tuned YOLO12n (98.3% accuracy), conducted data analysis and visualization (N=35).

title: FORECST: Online Hackathon Platform
conference: Led development of full-stack website (React.js, Firebase) in a team of 4.

title: PINTOS: Operating System Implementation
conference: Implemented kernel threads, user programs, file system, and virtual memory in C on QEMU.

title: MYFIT: Clothing Size Recommendation App
conference: Built Android app in Java in a team of 3 for visualizing clothing sizes.
